title: Support - App, user is logged out, correct data
scenario: Verify that logging out a mobile user from the tenant clears tenant-specific data (tenant name, tenant ID, user ID) in the Support/App card, while retaining the App ID and showing last connection as unknown.
steps: 1. Log in a mobile user to a tenant.
2. Ensure the Support/App card displays tenant-specific data (tenant name, tenant ID, user ID) along with App ID and last connection info.
3. Log the user out from the tenant.
4. Observe the Support/App card after logout.
expected: After logout, the Support/App card should show tenant name, tenant ID, and user ID as None. The App ID should remain unchanged. The last connection should display as "unknown".
